name: Mercurial Vapor 16 Elite
description: Engineered for explosive speed. Flyknit upper with All Conditions Control rubber outsole for grip on natural grass.

name: Predator Elite FT
description: Precision passing and shooting with Controlskin zones and a laceless design. Built for total control.

name: Future 7 Ultimate FG/AG
description: Adaptive FUZIONFIT+ compression band adapts to every foot shape. Dynamic stability on firm and artificial ground.

name: Phantom GX Elite DF FG
description: Gripknit texture across the entire foot for superior ball control. The ultimate Nike boot for technical players.

name: X Crazyfast.1 Laceless
description: Maximum speed starts with a featherlight Carbitex plate. Laceless design for a second-skin fit.

name: Ultra Match+ FG/AG
description: Lightweight MATRYXEVO upper fused to a plate for a refined fit on firm or artificial grass pitches.

name: Tekela V5+ Pro FG
description: Knit upper with embedded TechRide plate for explosive acceleration. Pro-level performance on firm ground.

name: Morelia Neo III Beta Japan
description: Hand-stitched kangaroo leather upper. The pinnacle of Japanese craftsmanship for the discerning player.

name: Charged Cleat Elite
description: UA CLUTCHFIT technology wraps the foot for total support. Charged cushioning for responsive energy return.

name: Gel-Lethal Field 3
description: GEL technology in the heel unit absorbs shock. Lightweight mesh upper for breathable comfort during matches.

name: Speciali Eternal Club SG
description: Heritage-inspired football boot for soft ground. Full-grain leather upper for a classic touch and durable build.

name: Fresh Foam Furon v7+
description: Exclusive Fresh Foam midsole with Hypoknit upper. Maximum cushioning meets speed on firm ground surfaces.
